name: Oatmeal and Dried Fruit Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all of the dry ingredients, including the dried fruit.
2. Add the oil and buttermilk; mix well.
3. Roll out the mixture into 1/8 inch thickness.
4. Use a cookie cutter to cut out 3 1/2 inch circles.
5. Arrange the cookies on oiled cookie sheets using a spatula.
6. Bake in a 350°F oven for 15-20 minutes.
7. Allow to cool on a wire rack.
